title: Champions Online
notes: Launcher works, I could log in, download the game and run it after ignoring the warning, but the game crashes at Cryptic logo

title: Champions Online
notes: Game crashes every once in a while, you need to raise the ulimit for it to not crash at start if it's set to 4096 (I have mine at 1048576 as per instructions in proton)
You may need to run on lower details to avoid crashes, but they also appear under Windows. Except for that, the game runs flawlessly.
